# Resource: retool_user

A user in Retool.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "retool_user" "example" {
  email      = "test@example.com"
  first_name = "Test"
  last_name  = "User"
  active     = true
  metadata = {
    role = "test_role"
  }
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `email` (String) The email of the user.

### Optional

- `active` (Boolean) Whether the user is active or not. Defaults to true.
- `first_name` (String) The first name of the user.
- `last_name` (String) The last name of the user.
- `metadata` (Map of String) Metadata associated with the user.

### Read-Only

- `created_at` (String) The date and time when the user was created.
- `id` (String) The ID of the user. Currently this is the same legacy_id but will change in the future.
- `last_active` (String) The date and time when the user was last active.
- `legacy_id` (String) The legacy ID of the user.

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

```shell
# Group can be imported by specifying the id
terraform import retool_user.example 123
```
